description: Single-image face detection: point in0 at an image file (.jpg/.png). face_detect (wrapped by metadata_file_writer) detects each face, aligns it, and embeds it (SFace), writing faces.jsonl as JSON Lines of {frame,pts,bbox,landmarks,score,embedding}. The decoded frame is re-encoded to out.mp4 (a 1-frame video). Only the video stream is mapped, so this also works on stills with no audio. Requires a with_onnx build and bundled models (MEDIAMOLDER_FACE_MODELS).
